programme.title: Giant Lavas
programme.desc: Nationally recognized geologist Nick Zentner leads viewers on science adventures through Washington. From massive lava flows to wandering mountains and a flank of Mt. Rainier that traveled to Tacoma. Nick Zentner is the Science Outreach and Education Coordinator for the Department of Geological Sciences at Central Washington University in Washington State. He has produced more than 40 short videos about central Washington geology. Since 2008, Zentner's colloquial, humorous lectures have made him a popular speaker at educational and civic organizations throughout the Northwest. In 2015, Nick received the prestigious James Shea Award, a National Association of Geoscience Teachers award recognizing exceptional delivery of Earth Science content to the general public.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nebraska Whitetails
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head to Nebraska's Sandhills for a whitetail deer hunt, guided by Jordan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Ducks
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins Jean-Paul Bourgeois and Ronnie Collins in Louisiana‚ Mississippi Delta for a duck hunt. Surrounded by the unique landscape of the Delta, they target multiple duck species. After a successful hunt, the team returns to camp, where Jean-Paul prepares a traditional Cajun meal featuring the day‚ catch. Experience the cultural tradition of turning fresh game into flavorful, local dishes like duck gumbo and crawfish boil.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Hogs and Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella, Ryan Callahan, and Danny Bolton travel to Hawaii's Big Island for a unique hunt. They stalk feral sheep in the lush mountainsides and target wild hogs on a coffee plantation, using the animals' movements through macadamia groves to their advantage. The episode highlights Hawaii's blend of hunting and conservation, ending with a Hawaiian-style feast featuring the fresh game they harvested.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Spearfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with spearfishing champions Danny Bolton and Kimi Werner.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose
programme.desc: In this episode of MeatEater, Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head into Alaska's remote interior.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Black Bear
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve introduces Randall Williams and Clay Newcomb to his fish shack in Prince of Wales, Alaska where they fish for cod, set shrimp pots and hunt for black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Michigan Squirrels and Rabbits
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve jets off to his home state of Michigan to hunt for small game with friends Guy Zuck and Kevin Murphy.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mule Deer
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful.

programme.title: MeatEater - Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve and Janis Putelis are in Florida with local, Richard Martinez, in search for the illusive Osceola Turkey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: Chefs Kevin Gillespie and Jean-Paul Bourgeois explore the origins of the classic combo of Duck with rice by seeing who can whip up the best plate of food. programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie

programme.title: Capítulo 166
programme.desc: Mia and Roberta fight for each of their parent's honor. Roberta and Alma discuss their real issue. Mayra reminds the students why to fight for Madariaga. Mendiola suffers a heart attack after an argument with Madariaga; Renata reveals her relationship with him. Madariaga reveals how his family died. Diego bets Tomás he can get Roberta to fall in love with him. Vico reveals she's interested in Giovanni.

programme.title: Capítulo 167
programme.desc: Roberta tells her Alma she loves her and begs her not to leave. Valeria demands Alma to stay from her "husband", Franco. Téo continues to pursue José. Diego adamantly continues to try to get Roberta. Giovanni sneaks into the school. Celina takes an ad about weight loss pills. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás plan to hook up with girls. Nico receives a letter from Cata telling him about his mother harassing Lupita. Mía kisses Gastón. Diego tries to pay off Simon to lose the race.

programme.title: Capítulo 168
programme.desc: Celina orders the slimming pills; Lupita is worried. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás invite three different girls back to the apartment; they are robbed. Mia and Vico catch Celina with the pills. Madariaga and Lupita comes and rescue the guys; Lupita finds out Tomás lied. Mia gets Miguel on punishment by Gastón. Téo confronts Mia about Miguel. Nico tells his father his true feelings and they are accepted. Miguel vows to destroy Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 169
programme.desc: Lupita gives Tomás a fake cheat sheet as a means to revenge. Diego asks his father for help in getting Roberta. Nico and Lupita get back together. Lupita and Mayra forgive each other. Madariaga helps Giovanni by getting him a job in the school cafe. Mia, Miguel, and Valeria go shopping for Mia's upcoming birthday party; Valeria is arrested. Téo is found out for cheating on the history test.

programme.title: Capítulo 170
programme.desc: Vico and Giovanni argue about being true to oneself. Franco decides to cancel Mia's party. Roberta accepts Diego's offer to race. Hilario, Hilda's former love, is hired as the new music teacher. Simon bets Roberta ten grand on the race. Roberta finds out what Diego did to her racing car. Mia calls Alma for help with her party. Miguel, tired of his harassment, tries to find information on Gastón. Franco tells Alma to find a way to make Carlo not give up on what he set out to do.

programme.title: Capítulo 171
programme.desc: Miguel continues to look for information on Gastón; at an asylum and learns Gastón's name is Juan and he has an aunt, Angelita; she plans to meet to talk. Alma and Mia decided to plan Mia's birthday party, however, it's the same day as Roberta's. Nico's father finds out Lupita isn't Jewish; Nico asks Madariaga to talk to his father. Roberta is angry that Alma is helping Mia.

programme.title: Capítulo 172
programme.desc: Gastón surprises Miguel at Angelita's house. Carlo finds out Alma lied to him. Téo protects José when Gastón threatens her. Diego nearly crashes and dies after someone cuts the breaks on his car. Carlo takes off without telling anyone. Miguel and José make a new plan. Diego and Roberta believe Simon cut the brakes.

programme.title: Capítulo 173
programme.desc: Roberta and Diego think Simon is responsible for cutting the brakes. Lupita finds out Nico lied about her being Jewish. Gastón tells Mía about his plan that caught Miguel, however, Miguel uses it to his advantage. Lupita and Nico go to dinner at his parent's; Nico's mom tests Lupita. Alma reflects on her time with Carlo. Vico helps Giovanni clean until morning; he tells everyone they slept together. Diego and Roberta steal Simon's car and takes it to a scrapyard. Miguel asks Mía for a loan. Diego get amnesia after a fight with Simon.

programme.title: Capítulo 174
programme.desc: Diego kisses Roberta. Miguel and José work together to find information on Gastón. Diego reveals he doesn't really have amnesia. José's tutor shows up at Angelita's. Lupita decides to become Jewish. Diego asks Roberta to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Patadas de ahogada
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Albertano y doña Lucha le organiza una fiesta, María se pinta el cabello y se pone su más lindo vestido para recuperar a Albertano, le dedica canciones compuestas por ella y le recita un poema. Doña Lucha se siente mal.

programme.title: Angeloterapeuta
programme.desc: Albertano le pide tiempo a María para pensar en el futuro de su relación y ella va con un brujo para pedirle ayuda. Doña Lucha intenta hablar con el chino sobre sexualidad, por lo que van a la fonda de Don Carmelo, donde ella termina ebria.

programme.title: Sexy calendario
programme.desc: A Doña Lucha se le ocurre hacer un calendario sexy con todas sus vecinas, pero no se vende como ella esperaba. María se pone colágeno en los labios para conquistar a Albertano.

programme.title: La cisterna y el charro negro
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque el agua de la cisterna sale muy sucia.

programme.title: Capitán raquetas
programme.desc: Luis está en problemas, ya que deberá armar un plan para evitar que lo echen de su trabajo. Además, doña Magda se actualiza en la moda y se pone uñas nuevas.

programme.title: Guerra de las albóndigas
programme.desc: Lorena y Liz se pelean para saber quién de las dos prepara las mejores albóndigas enchipotladas. Además, Roco recibe la visita de su madre.

programme.title: Cumple Magda
programme.desc: Los vecinos le preparan una fiesta sorpresa a 'Doña Magda' con todo y payaso y piñata. Liz y Lorena participan en un casting para Blancanieves.

programme.title: La visita
programme.desc: Hipólito recibe la visita de su hermano gemelo. Jorjáis emprende un negocio como repartidor de comida y taxi.

programme.title: La herencia de los Rivers
programme.desc: El papá de Lorena se aparece en el departamento de los Rivers para anunciar que heredará a su hija en vida y Germán tiene problemas con los interfones

programme.title: Vidrio roto
programme.desc: Los López Pérez colocan en su departamento un cristal que era para la ventana de Luis y Pedro necesita usar lentes.

programme.title: Las llaves de Angangueo
programme.desc: Los López Pérez reciben una invitación para el evento más importante de Angangueo y Vanesa debe recuperar un perro extraviado de la veterinaria.

programme.title: Seguridad ante todo
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Germán que ponga en el departamento protecciones de seguridad para Luisito Jr. y Rocko hace casting para formar una banda de rock.

programme.title: Cumplemes
programme.desc: Vanesa olvida el cumplememes de Fabián y sus amigos le ayudan a preparar una sorpresa. Un alumno de Silvia le confiesa que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Tu nueva mamá
programme.desc: El padre de Lorena regresa con la noticia de que se casó con su enfermera. El Borre y Virginia sacan su app para vender tacos.

programme.title: A lo chino
programme.desc: Los López Pérez tienen un adeudo de agua y Luis les decomisa su televisión. Germán se enamora de Meche, la nueva nana de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: ¿Dónde está Rambo?
programme.desc: Pedro ha extraviado a Rambo y se deprime. La suegra de Alejandra quiere llevar a los López Pérez de vacaciones.

programme.title: Mollejitas 'Mi flaquita'
programme.desc: Arturo tiene la idea de poner un puesto callejero de comida. Pedro y Cris aplican técnicas de feng shui en el departamento para las buenas energías.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La ex de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko tiene contacto con una exnovia y Alejandra se pone celosa. Los Rivers llevan a Luisito Jr. a algunos cástines.

programme.title: Tomasa
programme.desc: Luis compra un dispositivo inteligente para controlar el departamento y lo presume con los Vecinos. Los López Pérez rifan un extraño cuadro.

programme.title: La cruda
programme.desc: Rocko y Alejandra bebieron demasiado la noche anterior y no recuerdan nada de lo que pasó, Rocko fue arrestado por el robo de artículos para bebes y Luisito Jr. dio sus primeros pasos impresionando a sus padres de la nueva etapa que comienza.

programme.title: Prueba de embarazo
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que está embarazada, ¿cómo lo tomará la familia? Chris y su pareja han decidido adoptar a un bebé.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Capítulo 166
programme.desc: Mia and Roberta fight for each of their parent's honor. Roberta and Alma discuss their real issue. Mayra reminds the students why to fight for Madariaga. Mendiola suffers a heart attack after an argument with Madariaga; Renata reveals her relationship with him. Madariaga reveals how his family died. Diego bets Tomás he can get Roberta to fall in love with him. Vico reveals she's interested in Giovanni.

programme.title: Capítulo 167
programme.desc: Roberta tells her Alma she loves her and begs her not to leave. Valeria demands Alma to stay from her "husband", Franco. Téo continues to pursue José. Diego adamantly continues to try to get Roberta. Giovanni sneaks into the school. Celina takes an ad about weight loss pills. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás plan to hook up with girls. Nico receives a letter from Cata telling him about his mother harassing Lupita. Mía kisses Gastón. Diego tries to pay off Simon to lose the race.

programme.title: Capítulo 168
programme.desc: Celina orders the slimming pills; Lupita is worried. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás invite three different girls back to the apartment; they are robbed. Mia and Vico catch Celina with the pills. Madariaga and Lupita comes and rescue the guys; Lupita finds out Tomás lied. Mia gets Miguel on punishment by Gastón. Téo confronts Mia about Miguel. Nico tells his father his true feelings and they are accepted. Miguel vows to destroy Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 169
programme.desc: Lupita gives Tomás a fake cheat sheet as a means to revenge. Diego asks his father for help in getting Roberta. Nico and Lupita get back together. Lupita and Mayra forgive each other. Madariaga helps Giovanni by getting him a job in the school cafe. Mia, Miguel, and Valeria go shopping for Mia's upcoming birthday party; Valeria is arrested. Téo is found out for cheating on the history test.

programme.title: Capítulo 170
programme.desc: Vico and Giovanni argue about being true to oneself. Franco decides to cancel Mia's party. Roberta accepts Diego's offer to race. Hilario, Hilda's former love, is hired as the new music teacher. Simon bets Roberta ten grand on the race. Roberta finds out what Diego did to her racing car. Mia calls Alma for help with her party. Miguel, tired of his harassment, tries to find information on Gastón. Franco tells Alma to find a way to make Carlo not give up on what he set out to do.

programme.title: Capítulo 171
programme.desc: Miguel continues to look for information on Gastón; at an asylum and learns Gastón's name is Juan and he has an aunt, Angelita; she plans to meet to talk. Alma and Mia decided to plan Mia's birthday party, however, it's the same day as Roberta's. Nico's father finds out Lupita isn't Jewish; Nico asks Madariaga to talk to his father. Roberta is angry that Alma is helping Mia.

programme.title: Capítulo 172
programme.desc: Gastón surprises Miguel at Angelita's house. Carlo finds out Alma lied to him. Téo protects José when Gastón threatens her. Diego nearly crashes and dies after someone cuts the breaks on his car. Carlo takes off without telling anyone. Miguel and José make a new plan. Diego and Roberta believe Simon cut the brakes.

programme.title: Capítulo 173
programme.desc: Roberta and Diego think Simon is responsible for cutting the brakes. Lupita finds out Nico lied about her being Jewish. Gastón tells Mía about his plan that caught Miguel, however, Miguel uses it to his advantage. Lupita and Nico go to dinner at his parent's; Nico's mom tests Lupita. Alma reflects on her time with Carlo. Vico helps Giovanni clean until morning; he tells everyone they slept together. Diego and Roberta steal Simon's car and takes it to a scrapyard. Miguel asks Mía for a loan. Diego get amnesia after a fight with Simon.

programme.title: Capítulo 174
programme.desc: Diego kisses Roberta. Miguel and José work together to find information on Gastón. Diego reveals he doesn't really have amnesia. José's tutor shows up at Angelita's. Lupita decides to become Jewish. Diego asks Roberta to be his girlfriend.
